hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(printf '%s' "$input" | python3 -c 'import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("tool_input",{}).get("command",""))' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git[[:space:]]+push([[:space:]]|$)' && echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '([[:space:]]|^)origin([[:space:]]|$)' && git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" remote get-url origin 2>/dev/null | grep -q imthatcarlos; then echo 'BLOCKED: origin is the stale imthatcarlos fork. Use: git push sherwoodagent <branch>' >&2; exit 2; fi

input=$(cat); paths=$(printf '%s' "$input" | python3 -c 'import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin).get("tool_input",{}); p=d.get("file_path") or d.get("path") or ""; print(p)' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$paths" | grep -qE '\.sol$' && echo "$paths" | grep -q '/contracts/'; then (cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/contracts" && forge fmt "$paths" 2>&1 | tail -3) || true; fi
